mission.title: Install and Configure Bank Vaults on Kubernetes
mission.description: Bank-Vaults is a CLI tool designed to simplify the initialization, unsealing, and configuration of Hashicorp Vault, making it easier to manage secrets in cloud-native environments. Installing Bank-Vaults allows you to streamline secret management and enhance security in your Kubernetes applications.

steps.title: Install the Bank-Vaults operator
steps.description:
Install the Vault operator from the repository's Helm chart:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/bank-vaults/vault-operator.git
cd vault-operator
kubectl create namespace bank-vaults
helm install vault-operator deploy/charts/vault-operator --namespace bank-vaults
```
Or install via kubectl:
```bash
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bank-vaults/vault-operator/main/deploy/default/rbac.yaml
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bank-vaults/vault-operator/main/deploy/default/manager.yaml
```

steps.title: Deploy a Vault instance
steps.description:
Create a Vault custom resource:
```bash
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bank-vaults/vault-operator/main/deploy/examples/cr-raft.yaml -n bank-vaults
```
This deploys a Vault instance with Raft storage backend.

steps.title: Install the Secrets Webhook (optional)
steps.description:
The Secrets Webhook injects secrets directly into pods:
```bash
cd vault-operator
helm install vault-secrets-webhook deploy/charts/vault-secrets-webhook --namespace bank-vaults
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n bank-vaults
kubectl get vault -n bank-vaults
```

resolution.summary: Bank-Vaults operator is installed and managing a Vault instance on Kubernetes.

uninstall.title: Remove Vault instance and operator
uninstall.description:
```bash
kubectl delete vault --all -n bank-vaults
helm uninstall vault-operator -n bank-vaults
kubectl delete namespace bank-vaults
```

upgrade.title: Pull latest and upgrade
upgrade.description:
```bash
cd vault-operator && git pull
helm upgrade vault-operator deploy/charts/vault-operator --namespace bank-vaults
```

troubleshooting.title: Vault pod stuck in CrashLoopBackOff
troubleshooting.description:
Check the operator logs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vault-operator -n bank-vaults
```

troubleshooting.title: Vault unsealing fails
troubleshooting.description:
Check the unseal configuration in the Vault CR:
```bash
kubectl describe vault -n bank-vaults
```

troubleshooting.title: Secrets Webhook not injecting
troubleshooting.description:
Ensure the webhook is enabled and pods have the correct annotation:
```yaml
annotations:
  vault.security.banzaicloud.io/vault-addr: "https://vault:8200"
```

prerequisites.description: Ensure that you have kubectl installed and configured to interact with your Kubernetes cluster.
